allow: PowerShell($ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $url = 'https://github.com/tailwindlabs/tailwindcss/releases/latest/download/tailwindcss-windows-x64.exe'; $dest = "$env:TEMP\\tailwindcss.exe"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Downloaded to: $dest"; & $dest --help | Select-Object -First 5 } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $url = 'https://github.com/tailwindlabs/tailwindcss/releases/download/v3.4.17/tailwindcss-windows-x64.exe'; $dest = "$env:TEMP\\tailwindcss-v3.exe"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Downloaded to: $dest"; & $dest --help 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5 } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
